series_metadata.series_description: Includes training manuals, guides, registration correspondence and any related materials created and used during webinars to train County Boards of Elections staff in a variety of elections matters.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one (1) year or until no longer of administrative value, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for one (1) year or until no longer of administrative value, then may destroy., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
